name: adult 7+ small & mini chicken & brown rice recipe dog food
description: big on love, small in size. hill's science diet small & mini adult 7+ dry dog food is tailored nutrition to support graceful aging in small & mini dogs. specially made with nibble size kibble & contains a synergistic blend of nutrients for energy & vigor. a powerful blend of antioxidants reinforces their immune system balanced minerals for heart, kidney & bladder health easy-to-digest ingredients for healthy digestion complete and balanced nutrition to help keep your dog at their ideal weight
